questions.question: What is the purpose of a stem-and-leaf plot in daily life?
Which of the following is a benefit of using stem-and-leaf plots for time management?
Given the stem-and-leaf plot $\begin{array}{r|l} 3 & 1  2  5 \ 4 & 2  8 end{array}$, what is the range of the data?
What does the stem represent in a stem-and-leaf plot?

options.C: The ones and tens digits combined
options.D: The first digit of a number
options.E: The last digit of a number

questions.question: Suppose you have $5$ hours of free time per day. How can a stem-and-leaf plot help you manage this time for hobbies?

options.A: By showing the most time-consuming hobby
options.B: By allowing comparison of time allocations
options.C: By calculating the total time spent on hobbies
options.D: By identifying the hobby with the least time spent
options.E: By visualizing time distribution across hobbies

questions.question: If a dataset has a large range, what does the stem-and-leaf plot look like?

options.C: A mix of both, evenly distributed
options.D: A long list with mostly single entries
options.E: Very short, with nearly all data in one stem

questions.question: How can you use a stem-and-leaf plot to analyze spending habits?

options.C: To show how expenses are distributed across categories
options.E: To find the most expensive category

questions.question: Given the stem-and-leaf plot $\begin{array}{r|l} 2 & 1  3  5 \ 3 & 2  4 end{array}$, how many numbers are greater than $32$?
Suppose the times (in minutes) taken to complete a puzzle are $21, 25, 31, 35, 42, 45, 52$. Construct a stem-and-leaf plot for the data and describe the distribution.

A bookstore has the following prices (in dollars) for a set of books: $10.50, 12.25, 15.99, 18.75, 20.10, 22.50, 25.00$. Create a stem-and-leaf plot for the prices and find the range of the data. Show all your steps and explain your reasoning.

teacher_rules: Ensure students understand the concept of distribution in the context of stem-and-leaf plots.
Emphasize the importance of stem-and-leaf plots for visualizing and interpreting data in daily life scenarios.
Remind students to check their work by verifying calculations and plots.
